title: Rooter Invitational Series

{{DISPLAYTITLE:Rooter Invitational Series }} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=4 |name=Rooter Invitational Series |icon=Rooter-Invitational-Series allmode.png |tickername=Rooter Invitational Series |shortname=RIS |image=Rooter-Invitational-Series allmode.png |type=Online |team_number=32 |series=Rooter Invitational Series |organizer=Rooter |organizer-link=https://www.rootersports.com/ |organizer2=Sky Esports |organizer2-link=https://www.instagram.com/skyesportsgaming/ |sponsor= |mode=squads |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=15,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2022-07-25 |edate=2022-08-03 |instagram=rootersports |web=https://www.rootersports.com |discord= |facebook=rootersports |youtube=channel/UCA7Ss8b35m3Lz3R6-tTe2uA |next=Rooter Invitational Series/2024{{!}}2024 }}

'''Rooter Invitational Series ''' is a BGMI invitational tournament brought by '''''[https://www.rootersports.com/ Rooter]''''' in association with '''''[https://www.instagram.com/skyesportsgaming/ SkyEsportsGaming]''''' with a total prizepool of ₹15,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}.

==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{Tabs dynamic|name1=Hindi|name2=English|name3=Bengali|name4=Malyalam|name5=Kannada|name6=Tamil|This=1|hide-showall=true}} {{Tabs dynamic/tab|1}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Divine |b2=Captain Price |b3=Gamezo Tech |b3flag=in }} {{Tabs dynamic/tab|2}} {{broadcasterCard |position=English Commentator |lang=in |b1=Raider |b2=NekRoz |b2flag=in |b3=Inferno |b4=LUCIF3R }} {{Tabs dynamic/tab|3}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Bengali Commentator |lang=in |b1=Rohan Playzz |b2=10 Jeet Gaming |b2flag=in |b3=TTRXD |b3flag=in }} {{Tabs dynamic/tab|4}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Malyalam Commentator|lang=in |b1=PNX Rithu |b2=Katzy |b3=Two Face Gaming|b3flag=in }} {{Tabs dynamic/tab|5}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Kannada Commentator|lang=in |b1=FrostYT |b1flag=in |b2=Spectra Gaming|b2flag=in |b3=Jay }} {{Tabs dynamic/tab|6}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Tamil Commentator|lang=in |b1=Randy |b2=Glady |b3=Mr Tamilan |b4= }} {{Tabs dynamic/end}} ===Format=== * '''Rooter Invitational Series:''''' July 25th - August 3rd, 2022 ** '''''League Stage:''' Jul 25th - 28th *** 32 Teams divided into 4 groups (8 Teams in each group), League Round-Robin *** 6 matches per day — ''Map Order: Erangel > Miramar > Sanhok > Erangel > Miramar > Sanhok'' *** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 24 teams}} qualify for the ''Grand Finals''. ** '''''Grand Finals:''' Jul 29th - Aug 3rd *** 24 teams of ''League Stage'' divided into 3 groups (8 teams/group). *** 6 matches per day *** '''{{Bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}}''' qualify for the '''Pro Series LAN'''. ''*NOTE: Points Table will not reset from league stage to Grand Finals.'' ====Points Distribution==== {{PUBGM 2021 Points System|killterm=finish}} ==Prize Pool== ₹ 15,00,000 INR (≃$18,800 USD) are
